economic_notes: Minority partnership interests held in Ontario First Nations Limited Partnership, Ontario First Nations Sovereign Wealth GP, and Ontario First Nations Asset Management GP Corporation. GIC investment at RBC at 4.70%. Ongoing flood claim negotiations with ISC promissory notes. Capital projects under construction with carrying value of $20,356,747.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED due to inability to determine Asset Retirement Obligation (ARO) liabilities under PS 3280. The First Nation has not identified any ARO liabilities as of March 31, 2023 and auditors could not satisfy themselves by alternative means. Consolidated entity includes CMHC housing only. Multiple ISC promissory notes related to ongoing flood claim negotiations. Large capital projects under construction ($20.4M). Ontario First Nations Limited Partnership distributions of $778,416 recognized as revenue. Total government transfers calculated as ISC + FNIH + CMHC + Ministry of Community and Social Services + Ministry of Indigenous Affairs + Ministry of Health and Long-Term Care + Ministry of Children Community and Social Services + Ministry of Children and Youth Services + Ministry of Northern Development and Mines. OSR includes Grand Council Treaty #3, OFNLP, rental income, AKRC, miscellaneous, Anishinaabe Abinoojii Family Services, Kenora Chiefs Advisory, interest income, other revenue, and net deferred revenue movement.
